name: customizing-copilot
description: Customize and extend the GitHub Copilot CLI -- authoring skills, defining sub-agents, registering MCP servers, installing plugins, building an agent control-harness, reviewing customizations, and authoring <repo>-harness plugins -- with the per-skill folder conventions and Agent Skills best practices baked in. Ships the authoring-skills, defining-subagents, registering-mcp-servers, installing-plugins, building-harnesses, reviewing-customizations, and authoring-harness-plugins skills.
